field.name: status_name%l
field.hyperlinkFormatString: ~/AppHandler/View.ashx Query: {Page: 'query_scsl', Controller: 'DataCopy', Name: '[id]', Value: '[id] + this._queryFilterString'}, Script: 'beforeDrillDown$DataCopy(this);'

action.text: declare @invoke nvarchar(4000), @id nvarchar(4000) if exists(select 1 from dmscsl a join @s b on patindex('%,'+ rtrim(a.id) + ',%', b.text) > 0 where (a.status <> '0' and status <> '1') or kieu_chuyen <> '&TransferType;' or user_id0 <> @@userID) begin select 0 as value return end &CommandCheckLockedDate; select id into #s from dmscsl where exists(select 1 from @s where patindex('%,'+ rtrim(id) + ',%', text) > 0) and (status = '0' or status = '1') and kieu_chuyen = '&TransferType;' and user_id0 = @@userID select @id = '' select @id = @id + case when @id = '' then '' else char(255) end + rtrim(id) from #s select @invoke = 'TransferData.TransferData.TransferDatabase(&TransferType;,' + @id + ')' select '' as message, @invoke as invoke return

if exists(select 1 from dmscsl a join @s b on patindex('%,'+ rtrim(a.id) + ',%', b.text) > 0 where a.status <> '0' or user_id0 <> @@userID) begin select 0 as value return end &CommandCheckLockedDate; update dmscsl set status = '1' where exists(select 1 from @s where patindex('%,'+ rtrim(id) + ',%', text) > 0) and status = 0 and user_id0 = @@userID select 1 as value return
update dmscsl set status = '0' where exists(select 1 from @s where patindex('%,'+ rtrim(id) + ',%', text) > 0) and status = 1 and user_id0 = @@userID select 1 as value return

declare @ticket varchar(32), @filename varchar(128), @description nvarchar(128) select @ticket = lower(replace(newid(),'-','')) select @filename = rtrim(file_key) + '.zip', @description = replace(replace(replace(convert(varchar(19), getdate(), 126), '-', ''), 'T', ''), ':', '') from dmscsl where id = @id update @@sysDatabaseName..ticket set filename = @filename, description = @description where ticket = @keyTicket insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket values(@ticket, @@userID, '&TransferID;', '','', '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select @ticket as value return
